message:
test(fnp-python): conformance_log_exp.rs for exp2/log2/log10 (11 tests)

Adds conformance harness covering:
- exp2, log2, log10 50-case oracle comparison
- Integer input dtype promotion
- Empty array handling
- Bool input promotion
- Roundtrip and exact-value edge cases (powers of 2/10)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
